name: Amish Sugar Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a small bowl, blend together the sugar, flour, and salt.
3. Spread the mixture in the bottom of the pie shell.
4. Pour the evaporated milk over the sugar mixture. Do not stir.
5. Dot with butter and sprinkle cinnamon over all.
6. Bake for 50-60 minutes, or until the filling bubbles in the center.
7. This will not be a firm custard, so don't worry if it doesn't look like traditional custard pies.
8. Serve at room temperature.
